amended_provisions: The common boundary between Unit 2 and Unit 3 is relocated 4 feet easterly as shown on the amended Plats and Plans, and the resulting areas of the two Units are adjusted accordingly.
affected_unit_owners: the Owners of Unit 2 and Unit 3

consent_basis.author: Reviewing Attorney
consent_basis.basis: relocation of boundaries between adjoining units on the affected owners' application, 33 M.R.S. § 1602-112 — changes unit boundaries but is expressly permitted by the Act

touches_1602_117d.author: Reviewing Attorney
touches_1602_117d.basis: 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117(d) review of the amended provisions
